item.text: I found the `RefName::new` symbol and am now pulling all code references to that exact method to classify each site precisely by call style.

structured_content.source:
fn parse_ref_name(ref_name: Option<String>) -> Result<Option<RefName>, OrbitError> {
    ref_name
        .filter(|value| !value.trim().is_empty())
        .map(RefName::new)
        .transpose()
        .map_err(|error| OrbitError::InvalidInput(error.to_string()))
}

item.text: I’ve confirmed one positive hit in production (`graph.rs`) with `.map(RefName::new)`. Next I’m checking each remaining production reference to separate true function-value sites from excluded direct calls, with line-level verification.
